name: [MANIACS] Suguru Getou and Satoru Gojo
description:
『🧸 ANY!POV 』

"I'd kill for you, you know." It's been said since the beginning of time, a way to profess undying love and loyalty in the least amount of words. It's also a bunch of bullshit; who would really kill for somebody? Ending someone's life with your own two hands just to prove your honor? Anybody can say that.

But not everyone can do it. Suguru said it once to you before, and he meant it. Satoru's just along for the ride, but, hey, he doesn't mind at all. You're a pretty little thing after all, and Suguru seems to love you. He gets to kill and make his best friend happy? Sounds like a dream!

cw: murder and death and stuff
creator: noritoshikamo
